TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Dave Anthony == kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Dave Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. Dave Anthony Belushi, minkahul sa California na Amirika. Dave Anthony hiya ga m' Engi. Dave Anthony htagan ben sa cyaliboniya. hiya yutas ga squilq na Irish 移民,yaba ga 律師,yaya ga 理髮師. Anthony's yaba ga,lokah nbuqom),yaya ga 酗酒者 na laqi,hiya maki qutux qbsuyan kneril,hopa sazing kawas nya, Pam lalu nya.qani 夫妻 maki Anthony pqwasan biru yaya ru yaba likong la. Anthony mosoq mqwas beh Marin Catholic pqwasan biru 高中 ru maki California, Santa Barbara magal 自然 kian' pqwasan biru. t'aring magal kawas,Anthony balun nya mtzyaw syaqan na psibay squilq. Anthony taring mqwas ru myugi pincyogan maki San, Francisco,maki magal kawas nya.qnxan ru 表演 payat kawas maki New York.ru musa maki Los,Angeles.maki Los,Angeles lga,taring mtzyaw psibay squilq ru 作家,播客. mintzyuwaw nya kawas 1989,Anthony t'aring mqwas ru myugi na psibay 演戲. hiya ga 常客 maki San,Francisco na qsinu hlahuy.Anthony mhtuw cingay telivi na 單口喜劇, Jimmy Kimmel Live, The Late Late Show ru Comedy Central. raral ga,hiya maki US cingay kian mhtuw psibay qnxan nya kawas 2006,hiya ru Heather wal kekong la.maki qutux mlikuy laqi ru sazing hozil Maple ru Larry lalu nya. kinblayan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *a*e antħonj == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *a*e antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. *a*e antħonj βelus~ɕħi, minkaħul s~ɕa ʦ~ʨali*ornia na amirika. *a*e antħonj ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. *a*e antħonj ħtaɣan βen s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjaliβonija. ħija jutas~ɕ ɣa s~ɕquilq na iris~ɕħ **,jaβa ɣa **,jaja ɣa ***. antħonjʔs~ɕ jaβa ɣa,lokaħ nβuqom),jaja ɣa *** na laqi,ħija maki qutux qβs~ɕujan kneril,ħopa s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ nja, pam lalu nja.qani ** maki antħonj pqwas~ɕan βiru jaja ru jaβa likoŋ la. antħonj mos~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βeħ marin ʦ~ʨatħoliʦ~ʨ pqwas~ɕan βiru ** ru maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia, s~ɕanta βarβara maɣal ** kianʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. tʔariŋ maɣal kawas~ɕ,antħonj βalun nja mtzjaw s~ɕjaqan na ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕquilq. antħonj tariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi pinʦ~ʨjoɣan maki s~ɕan, *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo,maki maɣal kawas~ɕ nja.qnxan ru ** pajat kawas~ɕ maki new jork.ru mus~ɕa maki los~ɕ,aŋeles~ɕ.maki los~ɕ,aŋeles~ɕ lɣa,tariŋ mtzjaw ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕquilq ru **,**. mintzjuwaw nja kawas~ɕ ****,antħonj tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi na ps~ɕiβaj **. ħija ɣa ** maki s~ɕan,*ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo na qs~ɕinu ħlaħuj.antħonj mħtuw ʦ~ʨiŋaj teli*i na ****, *immj kimmel li*e, tħe late late s~ɕħow ru ʦ~ʨome*j ʦ~ʨentral. raral ɣa,ħija maki us~ɕ ʦ~ʨiŋaj kian mħtuw ps~ɕiβaj qnxan nja kawas~ɕ ****,ħija ru ħeatħer wal kekoŋ la.maki qutux mlikuj laqi ru s~ɕaziŋ ħozil maple ru larrj lalu nja. kinβlajan ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: == Dave Anthony == kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Dave Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. Dave Anthony Belushi, minkahul sa California na Amirika. Dave Anthony hiya ga m' Engi. Dave Anthony htagan ben sa cyaliboniya. hiya yutas ga squilq na Irish 移民,yaba ga 律師,yaya ga 理髮師. Anthony's yaba ga,lokah nbuqom),yaya ga 酗酒者 na laqi,hiya maki qutux qbsuyan kneril,hopa sazing kawas nya, Pam lalu nya.qani 夫妻 maki Anthony pqwasan biru yaya ru yaba likong la. Anthony mosoq mqwas beh Marin Catholic pqwasan biru 高中 ru maki California, Santa Barbara magal 自然 kian' pqwasan biru. t'aring magal kawas,Anthony balun nya mtzyaw syaqan na psibay squilq. Anthony taring mqwas ru myugi pincyogan maki San, Francisco,maki magal kawas nya.qnxan ru 表演 payat kawas maki New York.ru musa maki Los,Angeles.maki Los,Angeles lga,taring mtzyaw psibay squilq ru 作家,播客. mintzyuwaw nya kawas 1989,Anthony t'aring mqwas ru myugi na psibay 演戲. hiya ga 常客 maki San,Francisco na qsinu hlahuy.Anthony mhtuw cingay telivi na 單口喜劇, Jimmy Kimmel Live, The Late Late Show ru Comedy Central. raral ga,hiya maki US cingay kian mhtuw psibay qnxan nya kawas 2006,hiya ru Heather wal kekong la.maki qutux mlikuy laqi ru sazing hozil Maple ru Larry lalu nya. kinblayan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *a*e antħonj == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *a*e antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. *a*e antħonj βelus~ɕħi, minkaħul s~ɕa ʦ~ʨali*ornia na amirika. *a*e antħonj ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. *a*e antħonj ħtaɣan βen s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjaliβonija. ħija jutas~ɕ ɣa s~ɕquilq na iris~ɕħ **,jaβa ɣa **,jaja ɣa ***. antħonjʔs~ɕ jaβa ɣa,lokaħ nβuqom),jaja ɣa *** na laqi,ħija maki qutux qβs~ɕujan kneril,ħopa s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ nja, pam lalu nja.qani ** maki antħonj pqwas~ɕan βiru jaja ru jaβa likoŋ la. antħonj mos~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βeħ marin ʦ~ʨatħoliʦ~ʨ pqwas~ɕan βiru ** ru maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia, s~ɕanta βarβara maɣal ** kianʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. tʔariŋ maɣal kawas~ɕ,antħonj βalun nja mtzjaw s~ɕjaqan na ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕquilq. antħonj tariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi pinʦ~ʨjoɣan maki s~ɕan, *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo,maki maɣal kawas~ɕ nja.qnxan ru ** pajat kawas~ɕ maki new jork.ru mus~ɕa maki los~ɕ,aŋeles~ɕ.maki los~ɕ,aŋeles~ɕ lɣa,tariŋ mtzjaw ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕquilq ru **,**. mintzjuwaw nja kawas~ɕ ****,antħonj tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi na ps~ɕiβaj **. ħija ɣa ** maki s~ɕan,*ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo na qs~ɕinu ħlaħuj.antħonj mħtuw ʦ~ʨiŋaj teli*i na ****, *immj kimmel li*e, tħe late late s~ɕħow ru ʦ~ʨome*j ʦ~ʨentral. raral ɣa,ħija maki us~ɕ ʦ~ʨiŋaj kian mħtuw ps~ɕiβaj qnxan nja kawas~ɕ ****,ħija ru ħeatħer wal kekoŋ la.maki qutux mlikuj laqi ru s~ɕaziŋ ħozil maple ru larrj lalu nja. kinβlajan ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
